home.title: Status
home.subtitle: A production-ready foundation for EPFL applications
home.description: Everything you need to build secure, multilingual, and modern web apps at EPFL — authentication, i18n, UI components, and Docker deployment included.
home.featureAuthDesc: SSO via Microsoft Entra ID with JWT sessions and automatic token refresh.
home.featureI18nDesc: French and English support with next-intl and cookie-based locale persistence.
home.featureUiDesc: Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui components, and the Suisse Intl typeface.
home.featureDockerDesc: Standalone Next.js output in a multi-stage Bun Dockerfile with GitHub Actions.
home.ctaSignin: Sign in to access the Dashboard

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Inspect your session, groups and accreditations.
